name: My coworker ran me over with a forklift at work in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?
description: Get medical help now, report to employer, file workers' comp claim ASAP. Lawyer up before talking to insurance.

mainEntity.name: My coworker ran me over with a forklift at work in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get medical help now, report to employer, file workers' comp claim ASAP. Lawyer up before talking to insurance.
acceptedAnswer.description: Seek immediate medical attention even if injuries seem minor, then notify your employer and file a workers' compensation claim promptly. In Utah, workers' comp covers job-related forklift accidents regardless of fault.[1][5] Context: Forklift accidents often cause severe injuries like fractures or amputations, and delays can jeopardize benefits. Key factors: Document everything including photos of the scene; OSHA violations like poor training strengthen claims. Practical guidance: Avoid signing anything from insurance without advice; contact a workers' comp attorney for free evaluation to ensure full benefits. Utah law requires claims within 1 year.
